jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Hinduja Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
